metadata.title: Across · Be the answer when AI answers.
metadata.description: Across Inc. — Generative & Answer Engine Optimization (GEO·AEO). We design your brand to be chosen inside the answers AI gives.

hero.titleLine1: In a world where AI answers,

position.lead: Search is giving way to answers. We design how AI calls on brands and chooses them. We run our own products directly and supply <nowrap>core tech to partner products.</nowrap>

method.title: Brand strategy inside AI answers
method.leadLine1: We track surfaces, read rankings, and align to Korean-language and industry context.
method.leadLine2: Each of our own products takes its place.

practice.leadLine1: What we see, and how the outside frames us.
practice.leadLine2: Find us on the blog, in the news, and on video.

partners.lead: Partners who trust Across on both capital and strategy are shaping the standard for AI-answer optimization with us.

invitation.titleLine2: We'll read it first, and reply fast
invitation.lead: Product adoption, partnerships, media inquiries, hiring questions — or anything you'd like to share with us. Just send an email.

gpto.blurb: Diagnoses and improves how AI answers refer to your brand.

genrank.blurb: Cross-compares generative AI answers across models and time.

naeo.blurb: Analyzes exposure positioning in Naver's generative-answer environment.

hkgpto.blurb: Plants B2B brands into AI answers via Hankyung's authoritative content.

medigpto.blurb: Wins local AI recommendations with healthcare-specialized GEO.

customereye.blurb: Designs entry into AI recommendation lists for experts and small businesses.

contents.empty: We'll post the first record soon.

metadata.description: Across is a GEO·AEO (AI-answer optimization) company. From the age of search to the age of AI answers. Meet our founder, investors, and partners.

across.title: Across is an AI-answer optimization GEO·AEO company
across.p1: The moment ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini answers, your brand gets cited first.
across.p2: We validate with our own products first, then supply the same tech to partner products. We deliver only what's proven.

marketShift.title: From the age of impressions to the age of choice
marketShift.leadLine1: How AI generates answers and cites sources is fundamentally different from search optimization.
marketShift.leadLine2: The criteria changed, so the way you create results must change too.

kpi.geo: AI citation frequency, brand mention rate

competition.geo: A handful of brands AI picks

aiModel.detail: 5 global + 5 in China, monitored weekly via API

learning.detail: Trusted distribution network the AI learns from

customers.detail: Performance data transparently managed, KR and abroad

method.title: How we make AI talk about you
method.leadLine1: Diagnose · Strategy · Execute. Three steps, repeated, build your position inside AI answers.
method.leadLine2: Not by intuition but by data, we stack the reasons AI picks you.

diagnose.title: Diagnose
diagnose.body: We design the target questions for your industry and measure how the top 10 AI models answer them. Your brand and competitor mention rates come out as numbers, in context.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.body: From the diagnosis we design the optimization direction, expected outcomes, and timeline. We build the next six months' map from data, not gut feel.

execute.title: Execute
execute.body: We distribute optimized content across networks the AI trains on, monitor weekly, and keep improving.

ceo.title: Founder
ceo.name: Lee Jae-hong
ceo.role: Founder & CEO, Across Inc. · Creator of GPTO technology
ceo.bio:
Graduated from KAIST in Industrial Engineering, then worked as a Data Scientist and AE at Cheil Worldwide for three years.

Spent the next six years on planning and marketing at startups.

A full-stack operator who builds end-to-end, from planning to development.

achievements.book: Author of <cite>AEO·GEO Survival Strategy</cite> · #5 business bestseller
achievements.talks: Conference speaker at Kyobo Book Centre HQ
achievements.consulting: GEO seminars and consulting for major VCs and corporations, KR and abroad

partnersClients.title: The names that chose Across
partnersClients.leadLine1: Capital and the field made the same call.
partnersClients.leadLine2: Investors and partners moving the AI-answer era first stand with Across.

cta.title: Claim your spot inside AI's answer
cta.leadLine1: Just as SEO became the standard, GEO will too.
cta.leadLine2: Brands that move first land first in AI's answer.

metadata.description: Our own solutions — GPTO, GenRank, and NAEO — together with partner services Hankyung GPTO, MediGPTO, and Customer's Eye GPTO.

purpose.title: 1. Purpose
purpose.body: These Terms set out the conditions for using the information and inquiry channels provided on the website operated by Across Inc. (the "Company").

service.title: 2. Provision of Service
service.body: The Company provides company information, product and service descriptions, content, and an inquiry submission feature through the website. Service contents may change without prior notice.

userObligations.title: 3. User Obligations
items: Comply with applicable laws and these Terms.
Do not infringe on others' rights or interfere with operations.
Do not use false information or impersonate others.

ip.title: 4. Intellectual Property
ip.body: All content posted on the website (text, images, videos, logos, etc.) is owned by the Company or its rightful owners and may not be reproduced, transmitted, or distributed without prior written consent.

disclaimer.title: 5. Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: The Company is not responsible for service interruptions caused by force majeure such as natural disasters or network failures. The Company is also not responsible for the accuracy or legality of third-party services linked from the website.

governingLaw.title: 6. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governingLaw.body: These Terms are interpreted under the laws of the Republic of Korea. In the event of a dispute, the competent court under the Civil Procedure Act shall have jurisdiction as the court of first instance.

amendment.title: 7. Amendments
amendment.body: These Terms take effect from {date}. Amendments will be announced on the website.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Across Inc. (the "Company") protects users' personal information in accordance with the Personal Information Protection Act and related laws. This policy applies to the Company's website and inquiry channels.

items.title: 1. Personal Information Collected
lines: Required: name, email, inquiry type, message
Automatically collected: IP address, User-Agent, access time

purpose.title: 2. Purpose of Collection and Use
lines: Statistical analysis to improve service quality

retention.title: 3. Retention Period
retention.body: Collected personal information is retained for <emphasis>1 year</emphasis> after the inquiry is resolved, then promptly destroyed. If retention is required by relevant laws, it will be kept for that period.

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Disclosure
thirdParty.body: The Company does not provide users' personal information to third parties.

processors.title: 5. Processing Delegation
lines: Resend, Inc. — inquiry email delivery. Delegated items: name, email, message contents.

rights.title: 6. User Rights
rights.body: Users may at any time request access to, correction of, deletion of, or suspension of processing of their personal information, and such requests will be handled without delay. Send requests to <email>ask@across.center</email>.

security.title: 7. Security Measures
security.body: We apply transport encryption (HTTPS/TLS), access control, and storage minimization principles.
